title: SNDL Inc. (SNDL) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: According to Yahoo Finance analyst data, SNDL Inc. has a Strong Buy consensus rating as of March 9, 2026. The average one-year price target for SNDL Inc. is $5.71, with forecasts ranging from a low of $5.05 to a high of $6.51. Analysts forecast a significant turnaround with projected EPS of $0.21 USD for fiscal 2026. Next quarter's sales forecast for SNDL is $172.55M with a range of $171.99M to $173.11M. Sndl Inc. released its earnings results on March 12, 2026, reporting $0.029 earnings per share for the quarter, beating the consensus estimate of $0.011 by $0.018. In 2025, SNDL Inc.'s revenue was $946.40 million, an increase of 2.82% compared to the previous year's $920.45 million, with losses of -$15.77 million, 83.36% less than in 2024. SNDL's zero net debt and large cash reserve provide durable financial flexibility to invest in stores, pursue M&A, and withstand retail cyclicality. The transition to consistently positive operating and free cash flow signals structural progress converting revenue to cash, supporting reinvestment in retail openings and cushioning earnings volatility.
